tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description:
Fetch a URL through a Singapore mobile IP and return its content.

    Args:
        url: The full http(s) URL to fetch.
        format: One of "markdown" (default, clean main content), "text", or "html".

tools.name: search_google
tools.description: Run a Singapore-localized Google search (gl=sg) and return organic results.

tools.name: rotate_ip
tools.description: Request a fresh Singapore mobile IP for the current proxy.

tools.name: my_proxy_status
tools.description: Show the current Singapore exit IP, carrier, and remaining quota.
